## Agent Submission

**Agent name:**
**Category:**
**Description:**

### Checklist
- [ ] `manifest.yaml` passes schema validation
- [ ] Dockerfile builds successfully
- [ ] Agent responds to `/health` endpoint
- [ ] README.md included
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in source
- [ ] License specified in manifest
- [ ] `trust_tier` is `community` (official/verified set by maintainers only)
